history.text: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

The image shows a screenshot of a mobile application related to QRIS payments. The main part of the screen displays a QR code for a merchant named "zenyxx store" with an NMID and A01 identifier. Below the QR code, there is text indicating "SATU QRIS UNTUK SEMUA" and instructions to check the organizer application at a given website. There are also icons illustrating how to pay with QRIS, and a "Tutup" (Close) button. Further down, there are instructions for "Langkah Mudah Topup Saldo" (Easy Steps to Top Up Balance). The top of the screen shows the app title "Qris Merchant" and navigation tabs for "Qris" and "Riwayat" (History). The status bar at the very top indicates the time, battery level, and network connection.

  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
